questions.text: What is the contributing agency's ori code?
questions.explanation: Enter the ORI (Originating Agency Identifier) code assigned to the contributing agency by the DOJ. This identifies the agency submitting the live scan — not your personal information.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's authorized applicant type?
questions.explanation: Enter the authorized applicant type code for this submission, as assigned or required by the DOJ for your agency's live scan category.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's type of license/certification/permit?
questions.explanation: Enter the type of license, certification, permit, or working title (maximum 30 characters). Use the exact title assigned by the DOJ if applicable.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's agency authorized to receive criminal record information?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's agency authorized to receive criminal record information exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.
questions.placeholder: Agency Authorized to Receive Criminal Record Information

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's mail code?
questions.explanation: Enter the five-digit mail code assigned to the contributing agency by the Department of Justice. This is in the Contributing Agency Information section — not your personal address.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's address?
questions.explanation: This asks for the contributing agency's street address or P.O. Box — not your personal home address. Find it in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's contact name?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's contact name exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's contact telephone number?
questions.explanation: Enter the contact telephone number for the contributing agency — the person who can be reached about this submission.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's billing number?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's billing number exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.

questions.text: What is your first name?
questions.explanation: Enter your first name exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your middle initial?
questions.explanation: Enter your middle initial exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your last name?
questions.explanation: Enter your last name exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: Do you have an alias or other name?
questions.explanation: Choose Yes if you use another name or alias.

questions.text: What is your other last name (alias)?
questions.explanation: Enter any alias or other name you have used, if different from your legal name. This appears in the Applicant Information section of the form.

questions.text: What is your other first name (alias)?
questions.explanation: Enter any alias or other name you have used, if different from your legal name. This appears in the Applicant Information section of the form.

questions.text: What is your suffix for your alias name?
questions.explanation: Enter any alias or other name you have used, if different from your legal name. This appears in the Applicant Information section of the form.

questions.text: What is your date of birth?
questions.explanation: Enter your date of birth as shown on official records. Use MM/DD/YYYY.

questions.text: What is your sex?
questions.explanation: Select the option that best describes your sex as required in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your driver's license number?
questions.explanation: Enter your driver's license number exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your height?
questions.explanation: Enter your height exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your weight?
questions.explanation: Enter your weight exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your eye color?
questions.explanation: Enter your eye color exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your hair color?
questions.explanation: Enter your hair color exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your place of birth?
questions.explanation: Enter your place of birth exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your social security number?
questions.explanation: Enter your social security number exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your miscellaneous number?
questions.explanation: Enter your miscellaneous number exactly as it should appear on the completed form in the Applicant Information section.

questions.text: What is your home address?
questions.explanation: Enter your home street address or P.O. Box as the applicant. This is your personal residence — not the agency or employer address.

questions.text: What is the contributing agency's applicant number?
questions.explanation: Enter the contributing agency's applicant number exactly as it should appear in the "Contributing Agency Information" section on the PDF. This is about the contributing agency, not about you personally.

questions.text: Is this a resubmission?
questions.explanation: Choose Yes if you are resubmitting a prior live scan and need to provide the original ATI number.

questions.text: What is your original ATI number?
questions.explanation: If you are resubmitting, enter the ATI number from your original live scan submission. You must provide proof of rejection.

questions.text: What is your applicant signature date?
questions.explanation: This date is automatically set to today's date for your convenience.

questions.text: What is your employer name?
questions.explanation: Enter your employer's employer name for the Employer section on the PDF.

questions.text: What is your employer's address?
questions.explanation: This asks for your employer's street address or P.O. Box — not your personal home address unless you live at your workplace. See the Employer section on the PDF.

autopopulate.profileDescription: Employer Street Address or P.O. Box

questions.text: What is your employer telephone number?
questions.explanation: Enter your employer's telephone number (optional on the PDF).

questions.text: What is your employer's mail code?
questions.explanation: Enter the five-digit mail code assigned to your employer by the Department of Justice. This is in the Employer section — not the agency mail code.

questions.text: Please select your level of service
questions.explanation: Select whether this submission requires DOJ, FBI, or both levels of service. If FBI is selected, fingerprints will be checked against FBI records.
